title: WWA
description: The mod will add 11 weapons, 2 artifacts and 5 ingredients to create them. Some weapons have RMB abilities. All crafts in the mod are very complex and are intended to be played after killing the dragon.
body: The mod will add 11 weapons, 2 artifacts and 5 ingredients to create them. Some weapons have RMB abilities. All crafts in the mod are very complex and are intended to be played after killing the dragon, but at the same time they are all very strong. All models are in 3D fashion except for the ingredients.
